tilly.title: Absolute beginner
tilly.bio: Just learned how the pieces move. Hangs pieces, misses easy captures — the perfect first rung.

benny.title: Beginner
benny.bio: Knows a knight from a bishop, but one-move threats sail right past him. Loves a hopeful queen raid.

cassie.title: Casual player
cassie.bio: Plays for fun between coffees. Sensible opening moves, but gets lost once the position turns sharp.

maya.title: Human-like · 1100
maya.bio: Plays like a real 1100: the natural, slightly-wrong moves a beginner actually makes.

patrick.title: Club novice
patrick.bio: Solid and stubborn — trades down and clings to pawns. You'll have to actually outplay him.

rosa.title: Club player
rosa.bio: A real club regular. Develops sensibly, castles early, and punishes obvious mistakes.

gus.title: Coffeehouse attacker
gus.bio: Sacrifices first, asks questions later. Castle quickly and watch for cheap mating nets.

maxine.title: Human-like · 1500
maxine.bio: Principled, human moves with the occasional very human oversight.

knox.title: Solid defender
knox.bio: A brick wall. Trades pieces, avoids weaknesses, and grinds equal endgames. Patience required.

priya.title: Human-like · 1800
priya.bio: Strong club instincts: sound plans, quick tactics, and only the occasional slip under pressure.

nora.title: Human-like · 1900
nora.bio: Expert-level instincts and clean technique, with only rare human slips.

tess.title: Tactical expert
tess.bio: Sees combinations three moves deep. Leave a loose piece and it's gone in a flash.

vera.title: Positional master
vera.bio: Squeezes you slowly — better squares, better pawns, then a won endgame. Strategic to the core.

ivan.title: Master
ivan.bio: A titled-strength all-rounder with no obvious weaknesses. You'll need your best chess.

nadia.title: Grandmaster
nadia.bio: Near the top of the ladder: precise, deep, and ruthless. Mistakes are punished without mercy.

stockzilla.title: Maximum strength
stockzilla.bio: Full-strength Stockfish, no handicap. The final boss — beating it is a genuine feat.
